titleStmt.title: SII 8.652: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 652. (A.R. No. 343 of 1903). ON THE WEST BASE OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Uṟattūrkkūṟṟattuk koṭumpāḷūrk kaṟkaṭai trailo kkiyaṉāṉa kotaṇṭarāma mārāyaṉeṉ teṉkarait tevatāṉabrahmade yam Aṟiñcikaiccaturvvedi maṅkalattu sabhai yāriṭai nāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭai
ya nilam Āttiyuṭaiyāṉcuṟṟu meṟcuṭṭappaṭṭa perunāṉkellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi Uḷḷanilamellām Ivvaṟiñcikaiccatu Eriyil m Ōṭam Oṉṟukku Oṭam Icakkik kuḷatti
muṉ kuḷattil maṇ koṇṭuvantu karaiyilvaravil nūṟṟunāṟpatiṉ kūṭai maṇ koṇṭuvantu niccam nāṟkāl Ippaṭiyey koṇṭuvantu Uccaṅkaraiyil Aṭṭu kku māḷāṟukku coṟum puṭavaiyum Uṭ
paṭa nicati patakku nellāka Āḷ Āṟukku nicati nelluk kalamāka Ippaṭi Orāṭṭai nāḷaikku munnūṟṟuaṟupatiṉ kalamum Immaṇ ṇaṭṭuvikkuṅ kaṇkāṇi I ṉukku nicati kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi nellāka vanta nellu nāṟpattaiṅ kalamu
m Oṭam Aḻivucollun taccaṉukku Āṭṭu Irukalaṉe tūṇip patakkum kollaṉukku Irukalaṉe tūṇip patakkum maramiṭum valaiyarkku Irukalamum Āka Eṟṟinānū ṟiñcikaiccaturvvedi maṅkalattu sabhai yārey Inni
lam Uḻutu Ivarkaḷukku nel laṭṭi Ippaṭi ceyvikkakkaṭavarākavum . Ippaṭi cantrāditya vat ceyvikkakkaṭavarākavum . Ippaṭi ceyviyātu viṭil Aṉṟāḷuṅ kovey sabhai yārait taṇṭittuc ceyvikkakkaṭavarākavum . Ipparicey nivantañ
ceytu kaṉmel veṭṭuvitteṉ kotaṇṭarāma mārāyaṉeṉ . sabhai yomum Ippaṭi Icakkakkaṭavomāy Oṭṭikkuṭuttom . tūṇi patakkuk koḷḷuṅ kūṭai nūṟṟunāṟpatu kūṭai maṇ varavi laṭṭuvatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 8.652 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
